vpns.name: NordVPN
vpns.tagline: The fastest and most reliable VPN
pros: Fastest VPN with NordLynx protocol (887 Mbps)
Threat Protection blocks ads and malware
cons: Slightly more expensive than budget options

vpns.name: ExpressVPN
vpns.tagline: World standard in speed and reliability
cons: One of the most expensive VPNs

vpns.name: Surfshark
pros: Best price-performance ratio on the market

vpns.name: CyberGhost
cons: BBC iPlayer and some streaming services may not work

vpns.name: Proton VPN
vpns.tagline: The secure choice for journalists and activists
cons: Premium plan more expensive than competitors

vpns.name: Mullvad VPN

affiliate.note: Mullvad affiliate programı yoktur. Editoryal içerik olarak dahil et.

pros: Fastest WireGuard speeds in our testing (912 Mbps)
Anonymous payment via cash and crypto
Flat pricing: fixed 5 EUR/mo, no discounts
cons: Does not unblock any streaming service
No router or Smart TV support

vpns.name: PureVPN
cons: Streaming support inconsistent for some services

vpns.name: hide.me
vpns.tagline: Privacy-first VPN with a free plan

vpns.name: Astrill VPN
vpns.tagline: The go-to VPN for China and censored regions
pros: Works in UAE, Iran, and other censored regions

vpns.name: Hotspot Shield
vpns.tagline: Blazing fast speeds with Hydra protocol
pros: Proprietary Hydra protocol — very fast (620 Mbps)

vpns.name: F-Secure VPN
vpns.tagline: Security suite VPN from a trusted brand
pros: Part of trusted F-Secure security brand

vpns.name: PrivateVPN
pros: Good streaming support (Netflix, Disney+, BBC iPlayer)

vpns.name: Ivacy VPN
vpns.tagline: Ultra-cheap VPN with massive server network

vpns.name: VyprVPN
vpns.tagline: Swiss privacy with proprietary Chameleon protocol
cons: Only 5 simultaneous connections on basic plan

vpns.name: Avast SecureLine VPN
vpns.tagline: Mass-market VPN from a trusted security brand
pros: Easy to use for non-technical users
cons: VPN is not the core product
